nasb.text: Then Moses and Aaron came in from the presence of the assembly to the doorway of the tent of meeting and fell on their faces. Then the glory of the Lord appeared to them;

esv.text: Then Moses and Aaron went from the presence of the assembly to the entrance of the tent of meeting and fell on their faces. And the glory of the Lord appeared to them,

cnv.text: 摩西和亞倫於是離開會眾，來到會幕門口，俯伏在地；耶和華的榮光向他們顯現。

ccb.text: 摩西和亚伦离开会众到会幕门口，俯伏在地。耶和华的荣光向他们显现。
